title: Machine Learning by Design: From Problem Framing to Reliable Systems
description:
Machine Learning by Design: From Problem Framing to Reliable Systems is a concept-first textbook in machine learning for undergraduates, instructors, and serious self-learners.

The repository contains the LaTeX manuscript, figures, covers, and companion material used to build the current edition. The main text is licensed under CC BY-NC-SA 4.0. Companion code under companion/ is licensed separately under MIT; see the repository license files for details.
